articles.title: Cenovus Energy (TSX:CVE) Expands Output As Higher Oil Prices Come Back Into Focus
articles.summary: Cenovus Energy (TSX:CVE) is positioned to benefit from higher crude oil prices linked to renewed geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. The company is advancing major upstream projects, including Christina Lake North, Sunrise optimization, Foster Creek, and West White Rose. The combination of firmer oil pricing and rising production capacity is drawing fresh investor attention to Cenovus’s cash flow profile.
